sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 1:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 1:1
items.html: Ein Sof is the origin of the vessels of circles, since these vessels were already included in Ein Sof, but they were not apparent there, as in “He is one and His name, One.” (Part Two, Inner Observation, Item 52)
